title: Implement generic FieldVec<F: FiniteField> container (scalar)
description:
Implement the generic vector container for finite field elements, analogous to BitVec for GF(2) but over arbitrary fields.

```rust
pub struct FieldVec<F: FiniteField> {
    data: Vec<F>,
}
```

Basic operations (all scalar, no SIMD):
- Element access (index, get, set)
- Dot product: sum of element-wise products
- Map and fold operations
- Length, is_empty, iter
- From/Into Vec<F>

This is the generic container only. SIMD-accelerated specializations (delayed reduction, vectorized dot product) are tracked separately in 0fb99491.

No dependency on SIMD kernels — the generic container is useful before SIMD is available.

Location: crates/gf2-core/src/field/vec.rs (new file in the field module)
